scope: Kernel-local extension for Elementor V4 official property-level documentation sources not yet present in the base source manifest.

source_policy.upstream_source_of_truth: Official Elementor documentation remains the upstream source of truth.
source_policy.kernel_role: The Kernel stores structured source refs, claim summaries, scope, limitations, and doc coverage mappings.
source_policy.workbook_policy: Workbook-derived material is educational seed only and is never official Elementor proof.
source_policy.project_availability_policy: Official docs prove documented platform capability only, not availability in a target WordPress project.
source_policy.runtime_policy: Runtime proof requires future browser/runtime evidence and is not created by this manifest extension.

sources.title: What are logical properties?

claims.claim: Logical properties documentation supports writing-direction-aware property context such as start and end.

limitations: Does not create a full control registry or prove runtime layout behavior.

sources.title: Add and delete attributes

claims.claim: Attributes documentation supports V4 General-tab attribute add/delete and Dynamic Tags name/value context.

limitations: Does not prove safe target mutation, exact target UI path, Builder execution, or runtime DOM output.
